ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "survived" TEXT /* Survival status of the passenger (yes/no) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "passenger_class" TEXT /* Travel class of the passenger (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the passenger's ticket */,
  "fare" REAL /* The amount paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* The cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* The port of embarkation */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* The lifeboat number the passenger was assigned to, if any */,
  "body_number" TEXT /* The body number assigned if the passenger did not survive */,
  "relatives_onboard" TEXT /* A list of relatives (if any) who were also on board */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* The occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* The marital status of the passenger (e.g., single, married) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the passenger record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the passenger record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_passenger_class FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_class") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "cabin_features" TEXT /* Typical cabin features for the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the class */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Range of fares for the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the class record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the class record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival statistic */,
  "passenger_class" TEXT /* Travel class of the passengers */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passengers (male/female) */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of the passengers in the specified class and sex */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in the specified class and sex */,
  "total_survived" INTEGER /* Total number of survivors in the specified class and sex */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_passenger_class FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_class") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* The name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the `users` table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the `user_roles` table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the assignment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* The name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the team's focus and objectives */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the `research_teams` table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the `users` table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
